raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is the dark brown box. Its left side is accessible and its right side is blocked by box_2, so a lateral pinch grasp from both sides is not feasible. Use dual arms to establish a stable lift by pressing/supporting from the accessible left side and the accessible front side while ensuring the motion does not force box_1 into box_2. Verify there is enough clearance above box_1 for a lift and that the cup (in front of box_2, not box_1) will not be contacted during approach.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely controlled by both end-effectors via frictional/support contacts and is lifted off the table without shifting into box_2."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is the dark brown box. Its left side is accessible and its right side is blocked by box_2, so a lateral pinch grasp from both sides is not feasible. Use dual arms to establish a stable lift by pressing/supporting from the accessible left side and the accessible front side while ensuring the motion does not force box_1 into box_2. Verify there is enough clearance above box_1 for a lift and that the cup (in front of box_2, not box_1) will not be contacted during approach.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely controlled by both end-effectors via frictional/support contacts and is lifted off the table without shifting into box_2.
